positive: Minimalist geometric floral bouquet composed of abstract lines and shapes, centered composition, deep navy blue and warm mustard yellow color palette against a crisp white background. The design features repeating patterns of stylized leaves and blossoms, evoking a retro Art Deco feel with modern crispness. High contrast, clean silhouettes, suitable for large-scale print on t-shirts or tote bags. Vector art style, flat graphic design, elegant, clean lines, perfect symmetry, ultra-detailed.
